title: Richly Flavored Portuguese Avocado Pilaf
description: This rich, fluffy, energizing portuguese dish features extra virgin olive oil and is pescatarian-friendly. It's a perfect start to your day as a breakfast dish.

ingredients.name: 2 ripe avocados
ingredients.notes: Use Hass avocados for best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 30 ml cognac or other brandy for flambe

instructions: Finely chop the onion and mince the garlic.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté for about 5 minutes until soft.
Add avocadoes to the pan, mashing them into the onions with a fork. Cook for another minute or two, until avocados are softened.
Pour in cognac or brandy. Carefully ignite using caution; allow the alcohol to burn off before removing from heat (flambe).
Stir in baby spinach leaves and salt and pepper to taste. Cook until wilted, about 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish with eggs for breakfast.
